zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross於大約1321年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏萊斯利時，他的父親Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie43歲，母親Maria De Abernathy34歲。他和Euphemia Countess of Ross至少有1個女兒。他去世於1382年2月27日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross于大约1321年出生在英国苏格兰費伏萊斯利时，他的父亲Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie43岁，母亲Maria De Abernathy34岁。他和Euphemia Countess of Ross至少有1个女儿。他去世于1382年2月27日在英国苏格兰培爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross was born about 1321, in Leslie, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, was 43 and his mother, Maria De Abernathy, was 34. He had at least 1 daughter with Euphemia Countess of Ross. He died on 27 February 1382, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross est né environ 1321, à Leslie, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Maria De Abernathy, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Euphemia Countess of Ross. Il est décédé le 27 février 1382, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross um 1321 in Leslie, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie 43 und seine Mutter Maria De Abernathy 34. Er hatte mit Euphemia Countess of Ross mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Februar 1382 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross è nato il circa 1321 nel Leslie, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Maria De Abernathy, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Euphemia Countess of Ross. Morì il 27 febbraio 1382, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Rossが約1321年にイギリススコットランドフィフレスリーで生まれた時，父Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslieは43歳，母Maria De Abernathyは34歳であった。彼はEuphemia Countess of Rossとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1382年2月27日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross(이)가 대략 1321년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 레슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria De Abernathy(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Euphemia Countess of Ross(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1382년 2월 27일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross nasceu aproximadamente 1321, em Leslie, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Maria De Abernathy, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Euphemia Countess of Ross. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1382, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross родился около 1321 г. в местности лесли, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Maria De Abernathy, 34. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Euphemia Countess of Ross. Он умер 27 февраля 1382 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross nació aproximadamente 1321, en Leslie, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew de Leslie 6th Lord of Leslie, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Maria De Abernathy, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Euphemia Countess of Ross. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1382, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
